refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level. Decomposing it into sub-functions targeting each phase of the cycle (load, travel, dump) allows focused design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time p95 under representative duty cycles and site conditions, verifying each sub-function's contribution to overall cycle time.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by cycle phase but require coordination at cycle boundaries; manageable coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site and duty cycle data for optimization
Risk of suboptimal coordination between phases causing cycle time degradation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit coordination DP or interface to manage phase transitions.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system responsible for cycle time performance including load, travel, and dump operations

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time operational data and status feedback for cycle time monitoring and optimization

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives operational commands and cycle targets from higher-level control or operator inputs

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as cycle time optimization spans entire system; low diffusion risk if centralized.
Vehicle controls travel and dump but load handling may be external; moderate containment and diffusion.
Teleoperation supports remote control but not direct cycle time optimization; higher diffusion risk.
Safety services are orthogonal to cycle time optimization; minimal containment.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing cycle time optimization logic and coordination within NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves ownership clarity.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to broad scope
Risk of interface overload with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear sub-module boundaries within NGHE Solution to manage complexity and interface clarity.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the high-level cycle time requirement into manageable sub-functions with corresponding DPs that address each phase.

diffusion_risks: Cycle time logic centralized in NGHE Solution reduces duplication risk
Interfaces with Vehicle and Teleoperation must be well-defined to avoid diffusion
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary ownership; diffusion risks manageable with interface discipline.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed at system level via telemetry and tasking interfaces, with sub-FR verification through operational metrics.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module is clear and aligns with stakeholder responsibilities.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit coordination DP/interface for phase transitions
Define sub-module boundaries within NGHE Solution to manage complexity

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition and assignments meet the requirements and constraints with manageable risks; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.

revise.why: Current decomposition and assignments are adequate for next design steps.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Coordination between cycle phases can be managed within NGHE Solution
open_risks: Complexity within NGHE Solution module may grow
Interface overload risk with Vehicle and Teleoperation modules
evidence_needed: Operational telemetry data validating cycle time improvements
